title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!
